author: Darius Feher
name: H-Net Byte vs H-Net Subword Study
blurb: Systematic ablation comparing H-Net dynamic chunking on byte260 vs sp1024 tokenization. 20+ matched runs across 4 axes (chunk length, outer layers, ratio loss, LR diff). First working multi-GPU H-Net with boundary visualization showing the model learns word-level segmentation from raw bytes.
